content:
{
  "mnemonics": ["C.A.R.E." "Controlled Access Restricts Everyone"],
  "keyPoints": ["Key point 1: CSMA/CD (Carrier Sense Multiple Access/Collision Detection) is a protocol used for controlled access in Ethernet networks.", 
                "Key point 2: Token Ring protocol is a token-passing protocol that provides controlled access to a network.", 
                "Key point 3: ATM (Asynchronous Transfer Mode) is an ATM network that provides controlled access to high-speed data transmission."]
